---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What pain point does it address?

## Proposed Solution
How do you envision this feature working? Please describe in detail.

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches have you considered? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Use Cases
Describe specific scenarios where this feature would be valuable:

1. **Use Case 1**: 
2. **Use Case 2**: 
3. **Use Case 3**: 

## Implementation Ideas (Optional)
If you have technical ideas about how this could be implemented, please share them.

## Mockups/Screenshots (Optional)
If you have visual ideas for how this should look, please include them.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, requirements, or constraints about the feature request here.

## Priority
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - Would solve a major blocker
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement
